summary: The KHInsider FLAC pack now owns the strongest isolated core-cue families. This ledger tracks only what the older static-card reel still contributes after the redundant early cue blocks are discounted.

regions.label: Short duplicated micro-cue families
regions.note: These short active regions are useful mainly as corroboration because the named FLAC pack covers the clearer isolated versions of the same families.

regions.label: Residual transition burst
regions.note: This brief mixed region still helps with transition-shape comparison after the early isolated cue blocks are treated as redundant.

regions.label: Long composite gameplay reel
regions.note: This is the main remaining value in the indexed reel: a long mixed-context region that can still inform extended pacing and residual cue-family review.
